title: Kerala University Time Table 2026 Out

detail.title: Kerala University Time Table 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Kerala University Time Table 2026 released for Fourth Semester FYUGP Examinations April 2026. Check revised exam schedule for M.A, M.Sc, M.Com, MSW and other PG courses at exams.keralauniversity.ac.in.

content.text: Kerala University has officially released the Kerala University Time Table 2026 for Fourth Semester FYUGP Examinations on its official website - exams.keralauniversity.ac.in. The revised timetable is for April 2026 examinations covering Regular (2024 admission), Supplementary (2023 & 2022 admissions) students.

Students can download the official PDF and check their exam dates using their registration details. It is advised to verify all information carefully and contact the university examination wing in case of any discrepancy.
Direct Link to Download Kerala University Time Table 2026 Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download Kerala University Time Table 2026 Here

content.text: Kerala University Time Table 2026 has been published for the Fourth Semester postgraduate programs under the FYUGP scheme. This revised timetable includes multiple traditional and new generation courses for the April 2026 examinations.

sections.heading: Kerala University Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: The Kerala University Time Table 2026 provides detailed subject-wise exam schedules for various postgraduate courses. This revised timetable includes M.A, M.Sc, M.Com, MSW, MAHRM, MMCJ, MTTM and other new generation degree programs under the Fourth Semester FYUGP examinations.

rows: M.A / M.Sc / M.Com / MSW / MAHRM / MMCJ / MTTM

sections.heading: How to Download Kerala University Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can download the Kerala University Time Table 2026 easily from the official examination portal. Here is a simple step-by-step guide to help you access the timetable quickly.

items: Go to the official Kerala University examination website at exams.keralauniversity.ac.in.
Navigate to the timetable or examination schedule section.
Locate the link for Fourth Semester FYUGP Examinations May 2026 Revised.
Click on the relevant course timetable PDF.
Download and save the file, then take a printout for your reference.

content.text: Students should check the official timetable carefully and keep a printed copy for their exam preparation and daily reference.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Kerala University Time Table 2026

content.text: The Kerala University Time Table 2026 contains all important information related to the upcoming Fourth Semester examinations. Students must go through every detail mentioned in the official revised schedule.

items: Course name and semester
Exact examination dates for each subject
Exam timing and duration
Admission category (Regular / Supplementary)
Important instructions for candidates
Revised changes in the schedule if any.

content.text: Official Download Link: Kerala University Exam Timetable Portal
